goal: Reduce avoidable CUDA training preflight blockers by aligning the generated real-adapter training handoff with the existing strict Phi model cache at /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache. The generated backend_config.yaml and preflight report must use the same strict cache path, strict_model_cache_files must pass on the current host, and the release state must remain NOT_GO until real CUDA, LLaMA-Factory, Docker base image, real adapter, and no-fake endpoint evidence exist.
head: ea8dfe7
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates, Dockerfiles, scripts, tests, or specs
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may regenerate handoff/preflight review artifacts with the existing strict Phi cache path and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: Generated CUDA training handoff uses /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache for Phi
Generated backend_config.yaml and preflight report use the same strict Phi cache path
strict_model_cache_files and backend_config_ready checks pass in the current preflight report
Current preflight remains NOT_READY only for nonlocal prerequisites such as Docker base image digest, CUDA, LLaMA-Factory, and Docker base image availability
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not create or commit model weights; it points the handoff to an existing external strict cache under /tmp.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped artifact-alignment gate after confirming the strict Phi cache exists under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache while the current handoff points at /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed the strict Phi cache exists under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache and the previous handoff path caused an avoidable strict_model_cache_files blocker.
phase_notes.build: Regenerated CUDA training and preflight review artifacts so the generated backend_config.yaml, handoff command, and preflight report all use /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache.
phase_notes.check: Verified backend_config_ready and strict_model_cache_files are ok, current preflight remains NOT_READY only for Docker base image digest, CUDA, LLaMA-Factory, and Docker base image availability, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as an artifact alignment gate. It reduces avoidable local preflight blockers without claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: Regenerate CUDA training/preflight review artifacts with the existing strict Phi cache path, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No code, spec, test, product behavior, model artifact, Docker image, or release GO claim changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Open scoped artifact-alignment gate after confirming the strict Phi cache exists under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache while the current handoff points at /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache/model_cache.
pabcd.audit: Confirmed the strict Phi cache exists under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache and the previous handoff path caused an avoidable strict_model_cache_files blocker.
pabcd.build: Regenerated CUDA training and preflight review artifacts so the generated backend_config.yaml, handoff command, and preflight report all use /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache.
pabcd.check: Verified backend_config_ready and strict_model_cache_files are ok, current preflight remains NOT_READY only for Docker base image digest, CUDA, LLaMA-Factory, and Docker base image availability, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
pabcd.done: Phase complete as an artifact alignment gate. It reduces avoidable local preflight blockers without claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO.
